---
title: "Ebrahim Alhaddad"
image: "files/untitled.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:efalhadd@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/efalhadd/
---

::: {.hero}

# Welcome to my website!!

Hello! I’m **Ebrahim Alhaddad**, an analytics-focused software engineer and MSBA candidate at UC San Diego.

My work sits at the intersection of software engineering, data analytics, and business problem-solving.

This portfolio highlights selected projects, technical writeups, and analytics work, exploring different ways to turn messy data into clear decision-ready insights


[Explore my projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

:::
